name: Effects of Urolithin A Supplementation on Glucose Metabolism in Healthy Adults 55 >= Years Old.
short_name: Urolithin A older-adult glucose metabolism registry
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov recruiting randomized quadruple-masked 180-participant urolithin A trial in adults aged 55 to 100 years, with glucose, mitochondrial respiration, brain oxidative metabolism, and microbiome endpoints and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
